title: Mutated Mobs
description: Ever thought vanilla mobs were a bit... boring? Yeah, me too. This mod adds mutated versions of Minecraft mobs - bigger, meaner, and way more fun to fight (or run away from, no judgement).
body:
The Mod is Not Iris Compatible It Renders Not Right But not crashes in version 1.1 but in 1.0

The Withered Mutant

The first mob in this pack. A dual-wielding skeleton boss that spawns in the Nether and very rarely in the Overworld at night.

![Here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/347485b00d7afd6a794bf21c07e31b11130e5927.png)



Stats:
- 100 HP (yeah, good luck)
- 10 attack damage per hit
- Swings both swords randomly
- Actually pathfinds properly and doesn't get stuck on blocks

Behavior:
- Hunts players on sight
- Ignores you if you're in creative/spectator
- Wanders around when there's nobody to kill
- Takes short breaks while patrolling

Spawning:
- Common in Nether wastes, soul sand valleys, and basalt deltas
- Super rare Overworld spawns at night

Comes with a spawn egg for creative mode.


Railgun:

SPhere from it
![Sprehere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ade4bbc7dc095ea672a03e5537a0c65f7a0071_0.webp)

The bumm

![bumm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79027f9058cd87710c48792b56028dbe7fb2891a_0.webp)

The Lurker
![Lurker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2e79c1c60009d9f5c3922e352a07f32a1a186bf.png)

A tall horror mob that lurks in the Overworld. Very rare spawn. You'll hear him before you see him.

Stats:
- 150 HP
- One-hit kill attack (no, seriously)
- Full knockback resistance
- Slow but relentless

Behavior:
- Chases players on sight. Slow, but smart.
- When he gets close enough and can see you, he freezes you in place and kills you. No escape.
- After chasing you for 10 seconds, he starts a Hide and Seek game.
- He announces "Let's play Hide and Seek!", counts down from 60, and then comes looking for you.
- If he finds you (line of sight + close range), it's Game Over. He teleports in front of you and sprints at you full speed.
- At 30 seconds left in the search, he teleports 10 blocks ahead of you regardless. Game Over.
- You actually need to break line of sight and hide behind walls. He can't trigger Game Over if he can't see you.

Spawning:
- Very rare in the Overworld
- Comes with a spawn egg

Tips:
- Build walls. Seriously.
- Don't try to outrun him during the sprint phase, he has Speed V.
- During the countdown phase, get as far away as possible and hide behind solid blocks.


Debug Commands (for testing):
- /mutant spawn - spawn a Withered Mutant
- /mutant spawnnoai - spawn without AI
- /mutant anim [name] - test animations
- /mutant attack - force attack animation
- /lurker spawn - spawn a Lurker
- /lurker spawnnoai - spawn without AI
- /lurker anim [index] - test animations

Requirements:
- Minecraft 1.19.3
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- MCglTF

More mutated mobs coming eventually. Bug reports welcome, just don't be rude about it lol
